productDisplayName: Nike Men The Red Devils Black Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% certified organically grown cotton, that has ribbing around the neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, printed manchester united badge on the back below collar, the words "The Red Devils" below it and graphic print on the front saying "United"FittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron Do not dry cleanLine dryReturn to greatness with this Manchester United inspired T-shirt from nike. The pure cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comofrtable all day, while the graphic print of the words "United" on the front and "The Red Devils" on the back pays homage to the incredibly successful team. The Manchester United club seal printed on the back of the neck adds to the edgy vibe. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a casual look.
